name: Bright Data (npx)
description: Access the open web through Bright Data's infrastructure: search engines, scrape pages as markdown/HTML, bypass bot detection with Web Unlocker, drive a remote browser, and extract structured data. Runs locally via npx.

inputs.label: Bright Data API Token
inputs.description: Your Bright Data API token. Found in your Bright Data account under Account Settings > API tokens. The free tier includes 5,000 requests/month for the rapid-mode tools (search_engine, scrape_as_markdown).

obtain.instructions:
1. Sign in to your Bright Data account
2. Open Account Settings > API tokens
3. Click 'Add token' (or copy an existing one)
4. Copy the token value

inputs.label: Web Unlocker Zone (optional)
inputs.description: Name of the Web Unlocker zone to use for scraping. Leave blank to use the default 'mcp_unlocker' zone, which is created automatically.

inputs.label: Browser Zone (optional)
inputs.description: Name of the Browser API zone to use for browser-automation tools. Leave blank to use the default 'mcp_browser' zone.

auth.instructions: Create an API token in your Bright Data account under Account Settings > API tokens, then provide it as API_TOKEN.
